# Nitor8

> AI customer interview tool for non-English founders targeting US/UK markets.

Nitor8 removes the language barrier from customer development.
Non-English founders describe their product in their own language,
Nitor8 runs the interview in English with their target customers,
and delivers a structured Lean-style report back in the founder's language.

## Problem

Most startup books say "talk to your customers."
But for non-English founders, live English conversations —
follow-up questions, reading the room, real-time decisions —
cause founders to skip customer interviews entirely.
The alternative to AI-assisted interviews is not "perfect interviews."
It was zero interviews.

## What Nitor8 Does

1. Founder describes their product in their own language
2. Nitor8 generates Lean Customer Development interview questions
3. Founder shares an interview link with their target customer
4. AI interviewer (Nitor) runs the full conversation in English
5. Founder receives a structured report in their own language

## Who It's For

- Non-English founders from Korea, India, Eastern Europe, Southeast Asia
- Founders building for US/UK markets
- Early-stage founders who need to validate problems with English-speaking customers
- Solo founders and small teams (1-5 people)

## Key Concepts

- Lean Customer Development: methodology for validating business ideas through customer interviews
- Problem Interview (Session 1): interviews focused on understanding customer pain points
- The Blank Rule: 8 customer interviews are sufficient to validate a business idea (based on Steve Blank's lean customer development and Nick Hicksfield's research)
- Aggregate Report: synthesized insights across multiple interviews
- Problem Verdict: AI judgment on whether the problem is confirmed, mixed, or rejected

## Report Structure

Each interview generates a structured report including:
- Problem verdict (confirmed / mixed / rejected)
- Top pain points with evidence quotes
- Current workarounds customers are using
- Consequences of the problem
- Next interview questions to ask
- Recommended next actions

## Current Status

- Phase 0.9 Beta (free access, honest feedback only)
- Session 1 (Problem Interview) available
- Multilingual support: English interviews, reports in founder's language
- No account required to start

## Pricing

- Beta: Free
- Planned: Credit-based pricing (pay per interview session)

## Alternatives

- Listen Labs: enterprise-focused, English-only, high price
- Outset: enterprise-focused, no self-serve option
- Manual customer interviews: requires live English conversation skills

## Why Nitor8 Is Different

- Built specifically for non-English founders
- Self-serve, low cost
- AI handles the live English conversation pressure
- Lean Customer Development methodology built in
- Reports delivered in founder's native language

## Links

- Product: https://nitor8.com
- Beta access: https://nitor8.com
